title: The New Life Modpack
description: Official New Life Modpack: Ideal for players looking to jump straight in with only the must-have mods.
body:
The The New Life Modpack is crafted to enhance the Minecraft experience, particularly for players on the The New Life SMP server, while remaining fully compatible with other vanilla servers. This pack is designed to boost performance, integrate proximity voice chat via Simple Voice Chat for immersive multiplayer interactions, and ensure seamless gameplay compatibility with the The New Life server.

**Here are some of the key mods included:**

Sodium & Lithium – Improve rendering and overall game performance.

Entity Culling & More Culling – Optimize entity visibility to reduce lag.

Dynamic FPS & ImmediatelyFast – Enhance frame rate stability.

Simple Voice Chat – Enables seamless in-game voice communication.

AppleSkin – Provides detailed food-related information.

Zoomify – Adds a zoom function for better visibility.

Fabric API – Ensures compatibility with various mods.
